titleStmt.title: SII 8.364: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 364. (A.R. No. 84-A of 1903). ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinallu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīramāhēśvaraṁ cōḷakaṁṭaka karituragapaṭusubhaṭanicayavijitabahuparibaḷātimirakhaṇḍana pratāpa mārttaṁḍa
nikarakoḷgaṇḍa draviḷamaṇḍaḷika śiraḥkhaṇḍanaṁ maṇḍaḷika mukhamaṁḍanaṁ nadaṭamaṁḍaḷikatārakāsurāridasavarnna mudraṇaṁ
mitramaṇḍaḷikakulārṇnavacaṁdraṁ bāṇamudranityavikhyātamaṇḍaḷika māndhātraṁ hamāṟaṁ sēneyaṁkakāṟaṁ pallikoṇḍa
puradaṁḍādhīśvaradiśāpaṭṭa śrīmatṛbhuvanamalladēvara kaṭṭida lagumilavaranallagu nāmādi samasta praśastisahitaṁ śṛmanma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ mallarasaru tuṁbuḷanelevīḍinallu sindavāḍisāsiramumaṁ trubhōgābhyaṁtara suddhiyiṁ dāḷuttamire ta
tpāda padmōpajīvi samadhigata paṁcamahāśabdamahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ śiṣṭajanābhīṣṭa phalapradāya
kaṁ nijakuḷakamaḷinīdivākaraṁ nītiratnākaraṁ saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ ripukaṁjakuṁjaraṁ birudaraṇaikaṟe dōrdda
ṇḍaṁ kadanapracaṇḍaṁ viditakīrttidiśācakraṁ vāmīyacakraṁ birudaṁkasūregāṟaṁ rēciyaṁkakāṟaṁ bhagavatīdēvilabhdhavara prasādaṁ mallikāmōdaṁ
śṛmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ mallidēvana kaṭṭida lagumilavaranallagu nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmadguttiya daṇḍanāyakaṁ mārttaṁ
ḍarasaruṁ śrīmaddaṁḍanāyakaṁ paṁḍarasanuṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ basantarasanuṁ śrīmadguttiya rājavaidyaṁ kṣudrapāḷeyada sa
havāsi vijṛṁbhita bhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ jyēṣṭabhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ bhīma bhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ śrīmadguttiya kōṭeyalli duṣṭanigraha śi
ṣṭapratipālane geydāḷuttaṁ sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadimirddu śrīmaccāḷukyavikrama varṣa 23-neya
sarvvajitusaṁvatsarada Āśvayuja suddha 13 brihaspativāradaṁdu kōṭeya
Iṁkōjasiṁhāḷiyalu ceṁgama muṇḍu jīvitamārggadiṁ sāsanavrittiya
kōṭeya kālvāḷḷigaḷanitanitaṟelu kūḍikoṭṭuḷvari gadyāṇa 30 puṣpa kha 13
kōṭeya nairityada kargguṟukeya teṁkalu biṭṭaduke
mattaru 26 mūvarōjugaḷa manemānya
Intīdharmmamārānuṁ vakrastharādaḍe śrībilla
varasarāṇe koṭṭarggaṁ cakravarttigaṁ drōharu .
Digital edition of SII 8.364 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
